tasks.description:
Production
Audience: No segment override is stated in the MM source.
Mechanic / contents: Platform: Rolling Offer — Buy X Get Y (4 cycles) | H Pricing
Short Term: SNL (season start) · Mid Term: Globez (through 14/8)
Same day: X2 Extreme Stamp — cycles 2–4 use Extreme Stamp on Pay + stamp step (cycle 1 unchanged)
Hammers: only in this Rolling (single hammer source this day)

RDS/GGS: cycle 1 — Pay 1 RDS + 1 GGS · step 5 = 2 RDS · step 6 = 1 GGS
Cycles 2–4 — Pay 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS · step 5 = 1 Extreme Stamp · step 6 = 1 GGS
MGAP: denom 3 only · cycles 2–4 · no separate MGAP board row this day
Cycle 1: NO MGAP

Cycle 1:
  1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 RDS + 1 GGS
  2 — 100% SlotoBucks
  3 — 4 SNL Dice
  4 — 5 Hammers
  5 — 2 RDS
  6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 2:
  1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
  2 — 150% SlotoBucks
  3 — MGAP — different config (lower)
  4 — 8 Hammers
  5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
  6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 3:
  1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
  2 — 200% SlotoBucks
  3 — MGAP — different config (mid)
  4 — 10 Hammers
  5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
  6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 4:
  1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
  2 — 300% SlotoBucks
  3 — MGAP — different config (higher)
  4 — 12 Hammers
  5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
  6 — 1 GGS

Config: three MGAP configs on Rolling denom 3 (economist/Nivi). No Decoy paired with Popup Store on 12/8.
QA: Spin Zone / other offers — hammers only from this Rolling on 11/8.
Pricing: High

Reuse: NO - no exact recent operational reuse was verified.

Dependencies:
- Config status from MM: Config needed.
- Creative handoff: New theme for promo.
- Missing IDs/files/parameters remain owned by the relevant MM/Ops owner.
